visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) [People: Face/Hands] A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white rib-knit long-sleeve shirt and a black high-waisted skirt, smiles and points at a product. [Objects: Details/State] She holds a large red and green Doritos festive box featuring Christmas graphics. [Setting: Background/Lighting] Brightly lit Costco warehouse interior with high shelves stacked with bulk goods. (2) [People: Face/Hands] The woman points with her fingers to specific illustrations on the box while maintaining eye contact with the camera. [Objects: Details/State] Close-up views of the 'Merry Christmas' party pack box highlighting tree and bell-shaped chips. [Setting: Background/Lighting] Warehouse environment with industrial fluorescent lighting and shallow depth of field. (3) [People: Face/Hands] She rotates the box with both hands to display different sides. [Objects: Details/State] The box is moved from front to side view, showing printed nutrition facts and technical details in Chinese. [Setting: Background/Lighting] Surrounded by stacks of yellow and brown cardboard boxes of other snack products. (4) [People: Face/Hands] The woman gestures enthusiastically toward the two bag flavors displayed on the package. [Objects: Details/State] The box highlights 'Grilled Pork Ribs' and 'Christmas Roast Chicken' flavored bags. [Setting: Background/Lighting] High-ceilinged warehouse retail space with neutral-toned flooring and bright, even illumination.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: wish you a Merry Christmas. (2) [Subtitle]: We wish you a Merry Christmas. [Variety]: 尖叫聲!!. (3) [Subtitle]: 啊好可愛哦. [Logo]: 多力多滋. [Slogan]: 多力多滋最新出的. [Variety]: 聖誕大餐 派對包. [Slogan]: 299元超大箱. (4) [Subtitle]: 它直接把你做成一個聖誕樹. [Logo]: Doritos. (5) [Subtitle]: 還有這個鈴鐺哦. (6) [Subtitle]: 喔!這鈴鐺有點敷衍. [Variety]: 敷衍了事. (7) [Subtitle]: 這沒有辦法. (8) [Subtitle]: 但聖誕樹真的很可愛. (9) [Subtitle]: 然後包裝也很可愛. (10) [Subtitle]: 非常適合 你們聖誕節聚會的時候. (11) [Subtitle]: 年末party一定要放一盒. (12) [Subtitle]: 沒錯 交換禮物也好像可以. (13) [Subtitle]: 一打開裡面已經吃光光了. (14) [Subtitle]: 好賊哦 聖誕樹真的很可愛耶. (15) [Subtitle]: 它有6包299. (16) [Subtitle]: 所以一包是50塊錢哦. (17) [Subtitle]: 然後而且它也是用紅綠. (18) [Subtitle]: 我們來看一下側邊. (19) [Subtitle]: 你 你用倒了. (20) [Subtitle]: 來來來 紅綠各3包的是.. (21) [Subtitle]: 火烤肋排口味 跟聖誕烤雞口味. (22) [Subtitle]: 烤雞跟肋排 非常的年末哦.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white rib-knit long-sleeved top and a black high-waisted skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a large warehouse-style store, likely Costco, with tall industrial shelves stacked with bulk snack packages.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) [Vocals] A bright female voice sings holiday lyrics with a high pitch and positive energy. [Music] Upbeat 110 BPM festive BGM featuring electronic beats and jingling bells. [SFX] None. [Acoustics] Clean recording with slight warehouse room tone, focusing on the singing voice. (2) [Vocals] Dialogue between a female and a male speaker; the tone is friendly, casual, and conversational. [Music] Upbeat holiday BGM continues at a lower volume. [SFX] A soft metallic thud occurs as the box is moved. [Acoustics] High signal-to-noise ratio with clear voices. (3) [Vocals] The female speaker enunciates clearly while describing product features and prices with high arousal. [Music] Consistent festive BGM. [SFX] A distinct paper-like rustle is heard as hands touch the packaging surface. [Acoustics] Sharp spectral brightness in mid-to-high frequencies. (4) [Vocals] Energetic concluding remarks from both speakers in mutual agreement. [Music] BGM swells slightly for the outro. [SFX] A short digital UI-style 'pop' sound effect occurs during a visual transition. [Acoustics] Pristine tonal clarity and consistent volume levels throughout the track.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Feature Detail -> Value Proposition -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a new seasonal 'Merry Christmas Party Pack' of Doritos found at Costco, highlighting its festive packaging, unique flavors (Pork Ribs and Roast Chicken), and promotional price to encourage holiday purchases.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator actively promotes a specific product (Doritos Christmas Party Pack) at a specific retailer (Costco), mentioning favorable pricing.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a typical 'social-commerce' format, blending personal vlog-style interaction with direct product promotion, effective for seasonal marketing.
